The '''''Tachyon Flier''''' was a [[YV-888 freighter]] found by the [[Myrkr strike team]], who planned to use it to escape the ''[[Baanu Rass]]''. However, the strike team was betrayed by the [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Lomi Plo]] and [[Welk]]. [[Raynar Thul]] was aboard when they took off. The ship crashed in the [[Yoggoy]] nest, in [[Killik/Legends|Killik]] portion of the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]]. All three survived, although horribly mutilated, and were absorbed by the Killiks.

Seven years later, the site, known as [[The Crash (Yoggoy)|the Crash]], had become something of a holy place to the Killiks, partially due to its role in the creation of [[the Colony]]. [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] visited the ship's remains while searching for the Killiks.

{{Ship-stub}}
